name: PUPPET-2
authentication: none — no signature, HMAC, or sequence counter is verified; any well-formed packet is executed
multiCommand: a single IQ file may carry several packets back-to-back; they are executed in order

0x04.name: obc_reboot
0x04.description: Hard reboot OBC (comm drops to REBOOTING, then recovers)

0x15.name: adcs_target
0x15.description: yaw(int16)+pitch(int16) big-endian degrees; requires manual mode; large slews saturate the wheels -> tumble
